en: There's a man by the name of Captain William Swenson who recently was awarded the Congressional Medal of Honor for his actions on September 8th, 2009.

ja: ウィリアム・スウェンソン大尉は2009年9月8日の行動で議会名誉勲章を授与された。
zhTW: 有個叫William Swenson上尉的人最近因為2009年9月8日的行動獲頒國會榮譽勳章。
vi: Co mot nguoi ten Dai uy William Swenson gan day duoc trao Huan chuong Danh du Quoc hoi vi hanh dong ngay 8 thang 9 nam 2009.

en: On that day, a column of American and Afghan troops were making their way to the front of the U.S.      They were making their way through a part of Afghanistan to help protect a group of government officials, a group of Afghan government officials who'd be meeting with some local village elders.

ja: その日、米軍とアフガン部隊がアフガニスタンを進み、政府高官と村の長老の会議を守ろうとしていた。
zhTW: 那天，一支美軍和阿富汗部隊正穿越阿富汗的一部分，幫助保護一群政府官員，一群阿富汗政府官員要與當地村長會面。
vi: Ngay hom do, mot doi quan My va Afghanistan dang di qua Afghanistan de bao ve mot nhom quan chuc chinh phu, nhom quan chuc Afghanistan se gap cac truong lang.

en: The column came under ambush and was surrounded on three sides.
ko: 그 대열은 매복을 당하고 세 방향에서 포위당했어. 그리고 여러 가지 일 중에서
ja: 部隊は待ち伏せに遭い三方から包囲された。
zhTW: 部隊遭到伏擊，被三面包圍。
vi: Doi quan bi phuc kich va bi bao vay ba mat.

en: And amongst many other things, Captain Swenson was recognized for running into live fire to rescue the wounded and pull out the dead.

ja: スウェンソン大尉は銃弾の中に飛び込んで負傷者を救出し遺体を引き上げたことで表彰された。
zhTW: 在許多其他事蹟中，Swenson上尉因衝入實彈射擊中救傷者和運出死者而獲得表彰。
vi: Trong nhieu hanh dong khac, Dai uy Swenson duoc vinh danh vi chay vao lan dan de cuu thuong binh va keo thi the.
